response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies are not adapted to the changes in pressure and oxygen levels that occur in water  
their immune system reacts to the protein in peanuts which is not present in water based environments  
the physical properties of water make it difficult for them to breathe and move effectively in aquatic settings  

Sec. 2  
the lack of breathable air in underwater environments poses a significant risk to their survival  
the pressure in water is much higher than on land which can cause internal damage to their organs  
the inability to regulate their body temperature in water further complicates their survival in aquatic environments
